title: REDACTED INFO RETURN
body:
Monogon continues to update the mechanics exhibit, sending older pieces down here.

Breaking the mechanics into tablet fragments, I can send them without drawing attention.

If they start searching for anyone working on forked mechanics, you might be done for…

Please let me know when I can return to the lab, this basement is starting to get creepy.
Hopefully we can split out into the void and build something new asap

Thanks,
-Chris
